tool_args.label: Four years of outreach and support

payload.claim_text: Project Design is the Result of Four Years of Outreach and Support - 45+ community, stakeholder, and elected meetings; 375 respondents across three surveys; diverse coalition in support of the project (community, electeds, non-profits, unions)
payload.subject: Flatbush Avenue Bus Priority project

tool_args.label: Flatbush Avenue is in a Vision Zero Priority Area

payload.subject: Flatbush Avenue

tool_args.label: Multi-phased effort to improve bus service on entirety of Flatbush Avenue

payload.claim_text: Project is first part of multi-phased effort to improve bus service on entirety of Flatbush Avenue
payload.subject: Flatbush Avenue Bus Priority project

payload.claim_text: Left-turning B63 buses at Atlantic Av would have blocked the more frequent B41 and B67 buses traveling straight in the bus lanes along Flatbush Av. B63 buses would not have been able to use the dedicated bus lane to turn right onto 5th Av.
payload.subject: B63 route revision

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.
